description.value: Aura strong divination; CL 11th; Slot eye; Price 184,800 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION These goggles, constructed of a pair of perfect prisms held in place by golden frames and affixed to the head by a black leather strap, grants the wearer true seeing continuously. Furthermore, once per day on command, the wearer can use analyze dweomer as the spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, analyze dweomer, true seeing; Cost 92,400 gp.
